content.json:
# SpyCloud Executive Dashboard
**Enterprise Identity Threat Intelligence** - Comprehensive visibility into darknet exposures, credential compromise, device infections, and automated remediation across your organization.

> This dashboard consolidates SpyCloud breach intelligence with Microsoft Sentinel security data sources for executive-level reporting.

---

parameters.name: SeverityFilter
parameters.query: SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | distinct severity | order by severity desc
parameters.label: Severity

parameters.name: DomainFilter
parameters.query: SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where isnotempty(email_domain) | distinct email_domain | order by email_domain asc | take 50
parameters.label: Email Domain

content.json:
## Executive Summary
High-level organizational risk posture from SpyCloud darknet intelligence.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(Label:string, Value:long, Order:int)["Total Exposures", 0, 1]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize v=count()
| extend Label="Total Exposures", Order=1
| project Label, Value=v, Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
content.title: Total Exposures

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)["Total Exposures",0,1,"Unique Users",0,2,"Infected Devices",0,3,"Active Incidents",0,4,"Resolved Incidents",0,5,"Remediation Rate %",0,6,"Mean Time to Remediate (hrs)",0,7]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Total Exposures", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(email) | extend Label="Unique Users", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(infected_machine_id) | extend Label="Infected Devices", Order=3 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where severity >= 20 | summarize v=dcount(email) | extend Label="Active Incidents", Order=4 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(user_principal_name_s) | extend Label="Resolved Incidents", Order=5 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(let total = toscalar(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize dcount(email));
let remediated = toscalar(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize dcount(user_principal_name_s));
print Label="Remediation Rate %", Value=iff(total > 0, (remediated * 100) / total, 0), Order=6),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where severity >= 20
| join kind=leftouter (SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project email=user_principal_name_s, RemediatedTime=TimeGenerated) on email
| where isnotempty(RemediatedTime)
| summarize v=avg(datetime_diff('hour', RemediatedTime, TimeGenerated))
| extend Label="Mean Time to Remediate (hrs)", Order=7
| project Label, Value=toint(v), Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc
content.title: Key Metrics

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend SeverityLabel = case(severity == 25, "Critical", severity == 20, "High", severity == 5, "Medium", severity == 2, "Low", "Other")
| summarize Count=count() by SeverityLabel)
content.title: Severity Breakdown

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: Exposure Trend Over Time

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email)
| summarize Exposures=count(), MaxSeverity=max(severity), PlaintextPasswords=countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext)), DistinctBreaches=dcount(source_id), LatestExposure=max(TimeGenerated) by email
| top 10 by MaxSeverity desc, Exposures desc
| extend RiskLevel = case(MaxSeverity == 25, "CRITICAL", MaxSeverity == 20, "HIGH", MaxSeverity == 5, "MEDIUM", "LOW")
| project User=email, RiskLevel, Exposures, PlaintextPasswords, DistinctBreaches, LatestExposure)
content.title: Top 10 Most Affected Users
Active vs Resolved Incidents

content.json:
## Identity Threat Overview
Credential exposure analysis across domains, password types, and user populations.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email_domain)
| summarize ExposedCredentials=count(), UniqueUsers=dcount(email) by tostring(email_domain)
| order by ExposedCredentials desc
| take 20)
content.title: Exposed Credentials by Domain

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend PasswordCategory = case(
    isnotempty(password_plaintext), "Plaintext",
    isnotempty(password) and password_type has "cracked", "Cracked",
    isnotempty(password) and password_type has "hash", "Hashed",
    isnotempty(password_type), tostring(password_type),
    "Unknown")
| summarize Count=count() by PasswordCategory)
content.title: Password Type Distribution (Plaintext / Hashed / Cracked)

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email)
| summarize DomainCount=dcount(target_domain), Exposures=count(), Domains=make_set(target_domain, 10) by email
| where DomainCount > 1
| top 25 by DomainCount desc
| project User=email, DomainsExposed=DomainCount, TotalExposures=Exposures, SampleDomains=strcat_array(Domains, ", "))
content.title: Multi-Domain Exposure Map - Users Exposed Across Multiple Domains

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email)
| join kind=inner (
    IdentityInfo
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
    | where JobTitle has_any ("Chief", "Director", "VP", "Vice President", "President", "Executive", "Officer", "Head of", "Senior Vice", "Managing")
    | distinct AccountUPN, JobTitle, Department
) on $left.email == $right.AccountUPN
| summarize Exposures=count(), MaxSeverity=max(severity), PlaintextPWs=countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext)), LatestExposure=max(TimeGenerated) by email, JobTitle, Department
| extend RiskLevel = case(MaxSeverity == 25, "CRITICAL", MaxSeverity == 20, "HIGH", MaxSeverity == 5, "MEDIUM", "LOW")
| order by MaxSeverity desc, Exposures desc
| project VIPUser=email, Title=JobTitle, Department, RiskLevel, Exposures, PlaintextPWs, LatestExposure)
content.title: VIP / Executive Exposure Tracker

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let previous = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated < ago(30d)
| distinct email, source_id;
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend IsRecurring = iff(strcat(email, "|", source_id) in (previous | extend key=strcat(email, "|", source_id) | project key), "Recurring", "New")
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), IsRecurring
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: New vs Recurring Exposures Trend

content.json:
## Device & Endpoint Security
Infected device tracking, malware distribution, and MDE remediation status.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)["Infected Devices",0,1,"Reinfected Devices",0,2,"Unique Malware Families",0,3,"MDE Actions Taken",0,4,"MDE Success Rate %",0,5]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(infected_machine_id) | summarize v=dcount(infected_machine_id) | extend Label="Infected Devices", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(infected_machine_id)
| summarize ExposureCount=count() by infected_machine_id
| where ExposureCount > 1
| summarize v=count()
| extend Label="Reinfected Devices", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(breach_title) | extend Label="Unique Malware Families", Order=3 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="MDE Actions Taken", Order=4 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(let total = toscalar(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize count());
let success = toscalar(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where status_s == "Succeeded" or action_status_s == "Success" | summarize count());
print Label="MDE Success Rate %", Value=iff(total > 0, (success * 100) / total, 0), Order=5)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc
content.title: Device Security Metrics

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(infected_machine_id)
| summarize InfectedDevices=dcount(infected_machine_id) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: Infected Devices Count and Trend

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(infected_machine_id)
| summarize InfectionDates=make_set(bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)) by infected_machine_id
| extend InfectionCount=array_length(InfectionDates)
| summarize Devices=count() by ReinfectionBucket=case(InfectionCount == 1, "Single Infection", InfectionCount <= 3, "2-3 Infections", InfectionCount <= 5, "4-5 Infections", "6+ Infections"))
content.title: Device Reinfection Rate

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(breach_title)
| join kind=inner (SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where isnotempty(infected_machine_id) | distinct source_id) on $left.catalog_id == $right.source_id
| summarize DevicesAffected=dcount(catalog_id) by MalwareFamily=tostring(breach_title)
| order by DevicesAffected desc
| take 15)
content.title: Malware Family Distribution

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(infected_machine_id) and isnotempty(user_os)
| summarize Devices=dcount(infected_machine_id) by OperatingSystem=tostring(user_os)
| order by Devices desc
| take 10)
content.title: Infected Devices by Operating System

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize IsolationCount=count(), LatestAction=max(TimeGenerated) by device_id_s, device_name_s, action_type_s, status_s
| extend IsolationStatus = case(status_s == "Succeeded" or status_s == "Success", "Isolated", status_s == "Failed", "Failed", "Pending")
| order by LatestAction desc
| take 50
| project Device=device_name_s, DeviceId=device_id_s, Action=action_type_s, Status=IsolationStatus, ActionCount=IsolationCount, LastAction=LatestAction)
content.title: Device Isolation Status

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Total=count(), Succeeded=countif(status_s == "Succeeded" or action_status_s == "Success"), Failed=countif(status_s == "Failed" or action_status_s == "Failed"), Pending=countif(status_s == "Pending" or action_status_s == "Pending") by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: MDE Remediation Success Rate Over Time

content.json:
## O365 & Conditional Access
Correlation of SpyCloud exposures with Azure AD sign-in activity, conditional access enforcement, and Office 365 events.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ("high", "medium") or RiskLevelAggregated in ("high", "medium")
| where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers)
| summarize RiskySignIns=count() by Location=LocationDetails.city, Latitude=tostring(LocationDetails.geoCoordinates.latitude), Longitude=tostring(LocationDetails.geoCoordinates.longitude)
| where isnotempty(Location)
| order by RiskySignIns desc
| take 50)
content.title: Risky Sign-Ins from Exposed Users by Location

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)["CA Policy Enforced",0,1,"Password Resets Completed",0,2,"MFA Re-registrations",0,3,"Blocked Access Attempts",0,4]),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="CA Policy Enforced", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where action_s has "PasswordReset" or action_s has "password_reset" | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Password Resets Completed", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where action_s has "MFA" or action_s has "mfa_registration" | summarize v=count() | extend Label="MFA Re-registrations", Order=3 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | distinct email;
SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ResultType != 0 | where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers) | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Blocked Access Attempts", Order=4 | project Label, Value=v, Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc
content.title: Conditional Access Enforcement Summary

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend ActionType = case(
    action_s has "PasswordReset", "Password Reset",
    action_s has "RevokeSession", "Session Revoked",
    action_s has "BlockAccess", "Access Blocked",
    action_s has "MFA", "MFA Enforced",
    tostring(action_s))
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), ActionType
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: Password Reset Completion Timeline

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers)
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize BlockedAttempts=count(), DistinctIPs=dcount(IPAddress), DistinctLocations=dcount(tostring(LocationDetails.city)) by UserPrincipalName, AppDisplayName
| order by BlockedAttempts desc
| take 25
| project User=UserPrincipalName, Application=AppDisplayName, BlockedAttempts, DistinctIPs, DistinctLocations)
content.title: Blocked Access Attempts for Exposed Users

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Operation has_any ("Consent", "Add OAuth", "Update application")
| where UserId in (exposedUsers)
| summarize ConsentEvents=count(), DistinctApps=dcount(tostring(parse_json(ModifiedProperties)[0].NewValue)) by UserId, Operation
| order by ConsentEvents desc
| take 25
| project User=UserId, Operation, ConsentEvents, DistinctApps)
content.title: OAuth Consent Events from Exposed Users

content.json:
## Firewall & Network Correlation
Correlation of SpyCloud threat intelligence with network security events, firewall logs, DNS queries, and VPN activity.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let spycloudIPs = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(ip_address)
| distinct tostring(ip_address);
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where SourceIP in (spycloudIPs) or DestinationIP in (spycloudIPs)
| summarize Hits=count(), FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated), DistinctDevices=dcount(DeviceName) by SourceIP, DestinationIP, DeviceAction, DeviceVendor
| order by Hits desc
| take 50
| project SourceIP, DestinationIP, Action=DeviceAction, Vendor=DeviceVendor, Hits, FirstSeen, LastSeen, DistinctDevices)
content.title: SpyCloud IPs Seen in Firewall Logs

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let infectedDeviceIPs = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(infected_machine_id) and isnotempty(ip_address)
| distinct tostring(ip_address);
DnsEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ClientIP in (infectedDeviceIPs)
| where QueryType in ("A", "AAAA", "CNAME")
| summarize Queries=count(), UniqueClients=dcount(ClientIP), FirstQuery=min(TimeGenerated), LastQuery=max(TimeGenerated) by Name
| where Queries > 3
| order by Queries desc
| take 30
| project Domain=Name, Queries, UniqueClients, FirstQuery, LastQuery)
content.title: DNS Queries to Suspicious Domains from Infected Devices

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AppDisplayName has "VPN" or ClientAppUsed has "VPN" or ResourceDisplayName has "VPN"
| where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers)
| summarize VPNConnections=count(), DistinctIPs=dcount(IPAddress), DistinctLocations=dcount(tostring(LocationDetails.city)) by UserPrincipalName, AppDisplayName
| order by VPNConnections desc
| take 25
| project User=UserPrincipalName, VPNApp=AppDisplayName, Connections=VPNConnections, UniqueIPs=DistinctIPs, UniqueLocations=DistinctLocations)
content.title: VPN Connections from Exposed Users

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let spycloudIPs = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(ip_address)
| distinct tostring(ip_address);
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where (SourceIP in (spycloudIPs) or DestinationIP in (spycloudIPs))
| summarize Events=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Activity
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: Network Anomalies Timeline - SpyCloud IP Activity

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let spycloudIPs = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(ip_address)
| distinct tostring(ip_address);
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where DeviceAction has_any ("Block", "Deny", "Drop", "Reject")
| where SourceIP in (spycloudIPs) or DestinationIP in (spycloudIPs)
| extend BlockedIP = iff(SourceIP in (spycloudIPs), SourceIP, DestinationIP)
| summarize BlockCount=count(), LastBlocked=max(TimeGenerated), Devices=dcount(DeviceName) by BlockedIP, DeviceAction
| order by BlockCount desc
| take 30
| project BlockedIP, Action=DeviceAction, TimesBlocked=BlockCount, LastBlocked, FirewallDevices=Devices)
content.title: Top Blocked IPs from SpyCloud Intel

content.json:
## UEBA & Behavioral Analytics
User and entity behavior analytics correlated with SpyCloud exposure data to detect anomalous activity from compromised accounts.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
BehaviorAnalytics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers)
| summarize AvgAnomalyScore=avg(InvestigationPriority), MaxAnomalyScore=max(InvestigationPriority), AnomalyCount=count(), DistinctActivities=dcount(ActivityType) by UserPrincipalName
| where MaxAnomalyScore > 0
| order by MaxAnomalyScore desc
| take 25
| project User=UserPrincipalName, MaxAnomalyScore, AvgAnomalyScore=round(AvgAnomalyScore, 1), AnomalyEvents=AnomalyCount, DistinctActivities)
content.title: UEBA Anomaly Scores for Exposed Users

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let topRiskUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| summarize MaxSev=max(severity), Exposures=count() by email
| top 10 by MaxSev desc, Exposures desc
| project email;
BehaviorAnalytics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in (topRiskUsers)
| project TimeGenerated, User=UserPrincipalName, ActivityType, ActionType, InvestigationPriority, SourceIPAddress, SourceDevice=DevicesInsights
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100)
content.title: Behavioral Timeline for Top Risk Users

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
BehaviorAnalytics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers)
| where ActivityInsights has "FirstTimeUser" or ActivityInsights has "FirstTimeConnection" or ActivityInsights has "NewGeo"
| project TimeGenerated, User=UserPrincipalName, ActivityType, ActionType, SourceIPAddress, ActivityInsights, InvestigationPriority
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50)
content.title: First-Time Access Events from Exposed Users

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers)
| where RiskEventTypes_V2 has "impossibleTravel" or RiskDetail has "impossibleTravel"
| project TimeGenerated, User=UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, Location=strcat(tostring(LocationDetails.city), ", ", tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion)), AppDisplayName, RiskLevel=RiskLevelDuringSignIn, ResultType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50)
content.title: Impossible Travel Incidents for Exposed Users

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
BehaviorAnalytics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers)
| summarize InvestigationPriority=max(InvestigationPriority) by UserPrincipalName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: Entity Risk Score Changes Over Time

content.json:
## Remediation Tracking
End-to-end tracking of remediation actions, playbook execution, SLA compliance, and security group changes triggered by SpyCloud intelligence.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(union
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project TimeGenerated, Action="MDE Device Isolation", Target=device_name_s, Status=status_s, Source="MDE Playbook"),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project TimeGenerated, Action=action_s, Target=user_principal_name_s, Status=status_s, Source="CA Playbook")
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100)
content.title: Remediation Actions Timeline

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(union
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | extend PlaybookName="SpyCloud-MDE-Isolation", ExecutionStatus=status_s),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | extend PlaybookName="SpyCloud-CA-Remediation", ExecutionStatus=status_s)
| summarize Total=count(), Succeeded=countif(ExecutionStatus in ("Succeeded", "Success", "Completed")), Failed=countif(ExecutionStatus in ("Failed", "Error")), Pending=countif(ExecutionStatus in ("Pending", "InProgress", "Running")) by PlaybookName
| extend SuccessRate = iff(Total > 0, round(todouble(Succeeded) / todouble(Total) * 100, 1), 0.0)
| project Playbook=PlaybookName, TotalExecutions=Total, Succeeded, Failed, Pending, SuccessRatePercent=SuccessRate)
content.title: Playbook Execution Success / Failure

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let remediated = SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| distinct user_principal_name_s;
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| where email !in (remediated)
| summarize Exposures=count(), MaxSeverity=max(severity), LatestExposure=max(TimeGenerated), Sources=dcount(source_id) by email
| extend RiskLevel = case(MaxSeverity == 25, "CRITICAL", MaxSeverity == 20, "HIGH", "MEDIUM")
| order by MaxSeverity desc, Exposures desc
| take 50
| project User=email, RiskLevel, OpenExposures=Exposures, DistinctSources=Sources, LatestExposure)
content.title: Open Remediation Tasks - Unresolved Exposures

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 5
| join kind=leftouter (
    SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | summarize RemediationTime=min(TimeGenerated) by user_principal_name_s
) on $left.email == $right.user_principal_name_s
| where isnotempty(RemediationTime)
| extend HoursToRemediate = datetime_diff('hour', RemediationTime, TimeGenerated)
| extend SeverityBucket = case(severity == 25, "Critical (25)", severity == 20, "High (20)", severity == 5, "Medium (5)", "Low")
| summarize AvgHours=round(avg(HoursToRemediate), 1), MedianHours=round(percentile(HoursToRemediate, 50), 1), P95Hours=round(percentile(HoursToRemediate, 95), 1), Count=count() by SeverityBucket
| extend SLATarget = case(SeverityBucket has "Critical", 4, SeverityBucket has "High", 24, SeverityBucket has "Medium", 72, 168)
| extend SLACompliance = iff(AvgHours <= SLATarget, "COMPLIANT", "BREACH")
| project Severity=SeverityBucket, AvgHoursToRemediate=AvgHours, MedianHours, P95Hours, SLATargetHours=SLATarget, SLAStatus=SLACompliance, SampleSize=Count)
content.title: SLA Compliance - Time to Remediate by Severity

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OperationName has_any ("Add member to group", "Remove member from group") and Category == "GroupManagement"
| extend TargetUser = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
| extend GroupName = tostring(TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties[1].newValue)
| where TargetUser in (exposedUsers)
| project TimeGenerated, Operation=OperationName, User=TargetUser, Group=GroupName, InitiatedBy=tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50)
content.title: Security Group Membership Changes for Exposed Users

content.json:
## Breach Intelligence
SpyCloud breach catalog intelligence, new breach tracking, malware family trends, and sensitive source analysis.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by catalog_id
| summarize TotalBreaches=dcount(catalog_id), ActiveBreaches=dcountif(catalog_id, breach_status == "active"), RetiredBreaches=dcountif(catalog_id, breach_status == "retired")
| extend dummy=1
| project TotalBreaches, ActiveBreaches, RetiredBreaches)
content.title: Breach Catalog Overview

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by catalog_id
| project CatalogID=catalog_id, BreachTitle=breach_title, Status=breach_status, Description=breach_description, DateAdded=TimeGenerated
| order by DateAdded desc
| take 30)
content.title: New Breaches in Last 30 Days

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(source_id)
| join kind=inner (
    SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by catalog_id
    | project catalog_id, breach_title, breach_category=tostring(breach_category)
) on $left.source_id == $right.catalog_id
| summarize AffectedUsers=dcount(email), Exposures=count() by breach_title, breach_category
| order by AffectedUsers desc
| take 20
| project BreachName=breach_title, Category=breach_category, AffectedUsers, TotalExposures=Exposures)
content.title: Breaches Affecting Organization by Category

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(breach_title)
| where breach_category has_any ("malware", "infostealer", "stealer")
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 7d), MalwareFamily=tostring(breach_title)
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: Malware Family Trends Over Time

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where breach_category has_any ("sensitive", "private", "confidential") or breach_description has_any ("sensitive", "underground", "private")
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by catalog_id
| join kind=leftouter (
    SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | summarize AffectedUsers=dcount(email), Exposures=count() by source_id
) on $left.catalog_id == $right.source_id
| project CatalogID=catalog_id, BreachTitle=breach_title, Category=tostring(breach_category), Status=breach_status, AffectedOrgUsers=coalesce(AffectedUsers, 0), TotalExposures=coalesce(Exposures, 0), DateAdded=TimeGenerated
| order by AffectedOrgUsers desc
| take 25)
content.title: Sensitive Source Breaches
